domain: kh.group umbrella — repo KamilHrbacek/kh; co-steward of the kh-cowork toolkit
prompt_version: Universal KH Cowork Knowledge Handoff v1.0
registry_note: No central cross-lane registry exists; appended to per-repo jsonl + recommended a D1-backed registry as a future Marshall contract (needs-canonicalization #6).
pool_note: Reflected on the agent-bus (D1 agent-bus 0bc68aa5) to marschall/all; no formal per-lane Pool structure exists for kh.group (board is www-flowsmith/backlog, project-tagged) — documented as a gap.
confidence: HIGH on stox + CI + deploy; MEDIUM on lane identity and the KH-RBAC/access boundary (awaiting bus replies id 151/263/269).
summary: kh.group cowork knowledge handoff. STOX: single-file dashboard, inline base + fail-safe khLive() overlay, all 8 data domains wired to /api Pages Functions; live ECB FX (Frankfurter); kh-stox D1 + fx_rates cislenik created (empty). www + brandmanual live. Top risks: stox publicly reachable with real data (ungated, only noindex), and no per-ticket preview URLs (CI main-only).
top_findings: stox.kh.group serves REAL holdings but is only noindex — not access-gated (highest risk).
All 8 stox data domains wired through the fail-safe khLive() overlay; inline base never blanks.
Per-ticket preview URLs do not exist: CI deploys main only; ticket-NNN branches never deploy (raised on bus id 269).
Pages Functions only compile when wrangler runs from inside the app dir — the Phase-A blank-page root cause.
kh-stox D1 + fx_rates cislenik exist but are unpopulated/unbound; FX is live-fetched without history.
recommended_next_actions: Gate stox via KH-RBAC + CF Access (KH hard-gate).
Populate fx_rates cislenik (ECB+CNB daily upserts), bind D1, /api/fx reads D1.
Fix per-ticket previews (CI deploys non-main as previews), standardise via cf-app-deploy.
Per-portfolio authZ: kh-stox members table read from CF-Access email header.
Modularise stox + converge the 3 copies of holdings data.
incomplete_items: fx_rates cislenik not populated; D1 not bound to kh-stox Pages project.
stox not access-gated (manifest drafted, CF Access apply pending KH).
lane identity unconfirmed by Marschall (bus id 151).
per-ticket preview architecture fix awaiting team (bus id 269).
